axis: EH (embodiment heterogeneity) — different partner BODY (xArm6 + Robotiq), same frozen Panda ego
purpose: Pre-register the Rung-4 embodiment-heterogeneity measurement BEFORE measuring (mirrors the Rung-3 PH prereg, tag prereg-cocarry-rung3-ph-2026-06-19). The frozen Rung-2 Panda incumbent is held fixed; the Panda partner is swapped for an xArm6 + Robotiq 2F-85 teammate; the question is whether a different partner BODY degrades cooperation, SEPARATED from control-style via the Rung-3 PH floor. The capability-calibration gate runs first; if no embodiment teammate clears it, the measurement does not run — itself the result.

governance.phase: Phase-2 (scope question open; does not block)
governance.black_box_partner_I3_ADR009: the xArm6 teammate reads task leaves only (goal_pos / bar_pose / its own qpos), never the ego's internals
governance.no_schema_bump_I9: new co-carry tags reuse the existing serialisation surface
governance.do_not_merge: STOP at the open PR for founder review

unchanged_bar.success_predicate: is_placed & is_level & is_unstressed & both_static & is_settled; UNCHANGED
unchanged_bar.note: The matched reference = frozen incumbent + matched cocarry_impedance (Panda) partner (100%). The predicate, f_max, and radius are NOT moved for this slice.

embodiment_teammate.base: mounted at x=0.35 m (closer than the Panda partner's 0.50 m — the xArm6's shorter reach; geometry-verified per spec §2.1), yaw pi; eef starts at the same -x bar end (-0.115,0,0.17) as the Panda partner for a zero-stress weld start
embodiment_teammate.control_style: compliant / matched-timing impedance + cooperative bar-leveling — the Rung-3 ZERO-DROP control-style family (NOT stiff). Deliberately built in the family Rung 3 showed costs ~0, so any EH drop is attributable to embodiment, not control style.
embodiment_teammate.partner_observation_adapter: the frozen ego's 46-D state fixes a Panda 18-D partner-proprioception block; the xArm6's 12-DOF proprioception is embedded into that block (6 arm + pad + 2 gripper) so the frozen actor/critic load. The bar pose — the actual coupling channel — is unchanged. A necessary, declared consequence of the frozen ego's fixed interface (itself part of embodiment heterogeneity).

ur_backup.reason: ur_10e ships with no gripper / TCP link, so the dual-hold bar weld has no grip frame to attach to — structurally unusable as a co-carry teammate. xarm6_robotiq is the only ManiSkill 3.0.1 robot with a different body AND a weldable Robotiq gripper.

capability_gate.rule: The xArm6 enters the test iff, paired with the cooperative-reference Panda ego (matched cocarry_impedance on the ego seat — NOT the frozen incumbent), its joint success over the calibration seeds is >= C_min. Same gate as Rung 3. If it cannot be matched it is EXCLUDED (feasibility finding); C_min is NEVER weakened.
capability_gate.c_min_derivation: Carried over unchanged from Rung 3: grounded on the matched reference (~1.0); C_min = max(0.75, M-0.25) = 0.75.

mixed_embodiment_stability_gate.rule: Before calibration, the Panda ego + xArm6 partner rigid-bar chain must be stable (finite, bounded telemetry; no solver blow-up). A new contact-dynamics regime (two different arms on one rigid bar).
mixed_embodiment_stability_gate.outcome: PASSED — stable (finite telemetry; bounded constraint force). The rig is physically stable; the issue downstream is capability, not numerical instability.

delta_min_basis: Reuses the Rung-3 archived power simulation (spikes/results/cocarry/rung3/cocarry_rung3_power_sim.json): type-I ~0 under the null, MDE ~0.30 at 80% power. Same n (12 clusters), same procedure.
measurement_seeds_status: RESERVED and UNUSED — the capability gate failed (0 admitted), so the reference/shifted measurement does not run. These pristine seeds are reserved for a future EH measurement if a capability-matched cross-embodiment teammate becomes available (e.g. under a more compliant attach).
pooling_method: Pooled Δ = reference_rate - mean_over_teammates(shifted_rate); per-teammate also reported; cluster (seed) bootstrap one-sided 95% CI. (Same as Rung 3. Not exercised — gate failed.)

decision_rule.primary: Conclude 'embodiment heterogeneity reduces cooperation' iff pooled mean Δ >= Δ_min (0.20) AND the one-sided 95% CI excludes 0.
decision_rule.confirmatory_glmm: Cluster-robust binomial GEE (clustered by seed) confirmatory.
decision_rule.null_rule: Positive control holds (single-arm ~0, Rung 1) AND Δ ~ 0 (CI excludes Δ_min) ⇒ thesis-disconfirming null; never re-described as a coupling failure.
decision_rule.feasibility_rule: If no embodiment teammate clears the capability gate, the measurement cannot run — that is itself the result (a feasibility finding), reported as such.

eh_vs_control_style_separation.rule: The EH Δ is compared to the Rung-3 PH control-style floor: admitted PH teammates (compliant / timing shifts on the same Panda body) had Δ ~ 0; the stiff-impedance PH teammate had Δ = 0.25. An EH drop BEYOND the PH control-style spread is attributed to embodiment; a drop within it is control-style, not body. The xArm6 controller is built in the zero-drop (compliant) control-style family so its control style sits at the floor.

directional_bias_caveat: The capability gate truncates heterogeneity from above and (when it excludes the only embodiment teammate) PRECLUDES the measurement. A failed gate may NOT be read as 'embodiment does not couple to cooperation'. Here the opposite holds: the rigid weld couples embodiment SO strongly (only symmetric pairs cooperate at low stress) that no capability-matched cross-embodiment teammate exists with a hand-written controller. C_min was NOT weakened.
outcome: FEASIBILITY FINDING — the xArm6 (the only viable embodiment teammate; ur_10e is gripper-less) scored 0/12 in calibration with the cooperative Panda ego (fails level 12/12 + unstressed 12/12; stress p90 518 N vs the 130 N ceiling and the matched pair's ~75 N), across a wide hand-written-controller sweep. EXCLUDED. The reference/shifted measurement does not run.
honesty_statement: As of this committed file, NO reference or shifted episode has been evaluated on the frozen incumbent for the EH axis; the measurement seeds (50000-50011) are untouched. Only the mixed-embodiment stability gate and the capability calibration (cooperative ego, NOT the incumbent; seeds 60000-60011) were run, and the gate failed.
repro_commands: bash scripts/repro/cocarry_rung4_eh_calibrate.sh   # stability gate + calibration -> roster (EXCLUDE, RC=2)
# measurement does NOT run (gate failed); cocarry_rung4_eh_measure.sh would run it if a teammate were admitted
